game.venue_name: Salt River Fields at Talking Stick

plays.summary: Coors Field (PF 117) is in a category of its own — the altitude inflates scoring regardless of pitching quality. Chase Dollander (4.77 xFIP) is the more hittable of the two starters. Both lineups grade below average (SEA 103 / COL 91 wRC+) pulls the other way, but not enough to flip the lean. No line yet — model is at 10.5 runs. Watch for a over when odds open.
